ocr.text: In Table 1, the placebo group (n = 9) exhibited an erythrocyte sedimentation rate (mmHg) mean ± SD of 15.5 ± 10.1 at baseline,
19.6 ± 12.9 at 3 months, and 12.8 ± 10.6 at 6 months, while the polymerized-type I collagen group (n = 10) showed 15.5 ± 10.1
at baseline, 11.9 ± 13.1 at 3 months, and 7.8 ± 6.7 at 6 months. The anti-cyclic citrullinated peptide antibodies (U) mean ± SD
was 1.8 ± 0.7 for the placebo group at baseline, with a median of 1.9 and a range of (0.9–3.0), whereas the collagen group had
4.3 ± 4.8, with a median of 2.7 and a range of (0.5–13.4).

Urinary levels of C-terminal crosslinking telopeptide of collagen type II (ng mmol−1) mean ± SD were 281.4 ± 291.5
(baseline), 283.1 ± 245.0 (3 months), and 474.4 ± 333.9 (6 months) for the placebo, while the collagen group had 214.3 ± 179.9,
196.6 ± 167.4, and 266.6 ± 146.7, respectively, with medians of 160.0, 229.3, 460.4 for placebo and 171.9, 158.9, 237.4 for
collagen. In Table 2, the strain namea includes BL196 (2005, Kelantan, Malaysia, Blood, Outbreak), CR0044 (2007, Kelantan,
Malaysia, Stool, Carrier), ST0208 (2008, Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, Stool, Sporadic), CT18 (1993, Mekong Delta, Vietnam,
Blood, NA), Ty2 (1916, Russia, NA, NA), and P-stx-12 (2009, Varanassi, India, Stool, Carrier).
